title: Use in-memory MongoDB for development
description: Modified database connection logic to use mongodb-memory-server when USE_IN_MEMORY_DB=true in environment, eliminating the need for real MongoDB with credentials.

changes.db.js: Added conditional logic to use MongoMemoryServer when useInMemoryDb flag is true; added detailed logging of MongoDB connection info.
changes.config.js: Added useInMemoryDb configuration from USE_IN_MEMORY_DB environment variable.
changes..env: Set USE_IN_MEMORY_DB=true to enable in-memory database for development.

result: Auth endpoints now functional: register (201) and login (200) return valid JWT tokens.
